old_reservation: This reservation is older than 14 days.
title: Title
author: Author
password_update_error: Error updating password. Please try again.
reservation_mail_body: Dear Mrs./ Mr. {surname}, Your reservation is ready for pickup!
remove_books_before_delete: Please remove all books from the reservation before deleting it.
storage_statistics_desc: Show storage stats for book covers in GB.
shop_search_description: Show shop search data for the last 30 days.
name: Name
tags_desc: Tags will be used for organization and classification, so it makes search better and allows for recommendations.
conditions_desc: Conditions provide information about the quality of a product.
formats_desc: Types define the nature of a product more precisely.
genres_desc: Genres serve to roughly structure and hierarchically order the product range.
inventory_desc: After creating a new inventory you will see a new button in the search. In Inventory Mode you can mark books as found and not found. Closing an inventory means marking all not found books as removed and reset inventory state on all books.
cleanup_desc: Immediately deletes all books marked as sold or removed. Usually those books will be automatically deleted after a few days.
branch_name_help: The name is shown in the filters, the public search and on other places.
branch_steps_help: The price of a book can be increased and decreased in fixed steps.
branch_ordering_help: How customers can purchase the book. This text is shown in the public search for every book.
is_public_help: Whether you want to appear in the public search or not.
activate_cart_help: Are users allowed to add books to the cart?
content_help: The content will be shown on the shop's homepage. A subset of Markdown and HTML is allowed.
mail_reservation_help: Text, that's send as an email to the customer.
price_calc_release_year_help: Use keypairs like YEAR:PRICE e.g. 2021:-1. One entry per line.
price_calc_condition_help: Use keypairs like CONDITION_ID:PRICE e.g. 1:2. One entry per line.
only_admins_can_edit_branch: Only admins can edit branch settings.
branch_update_failed: Branch update failed. Please try again.
cleanup_error: Error cleaning products. Please try again.
tag_creation_failed: Tag creation failed. Please try again.
genre_creation_failed: Genre creation failed. Please try again.
format_creation_failed: Format creation failed. Please try again.
condition_creation_failed: Condition creation failed. Please try again.
tag_delete_error: Error deleting tag. Please note: If the tag is associated with any products, it cannot be deleted.
genre_delete_error: Error deleting genre. Please note: If the genre is associated with any products, it cannot be deleted.
format_delete_error: Error deleting format. Please note: If the format is associated with any products, it cannot be deleted.
condition_delete_error: Error deleting condition. Please note: If the condition is associated with any products, it cannot be deleted.
